title: ilex keranjiensis
intro: Ilex keranjiensis, also known as the Kerinci holly, is a plant species that belongs to the family Aquifoliaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ilex keranjiensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
